saveframes.name: entry_information_1
tags: Solid-state NMR assignment of side-chain protons of HBV core protein at fast MAS and high field
Solid-state NMR assignment of side-chain protons of Hepatits B virus core protein Cp149 in the capsid form at 160 kHz MAS and 1.2 GHz proton magnetic field

saveframes.name: citations_1
tags: High and fast: NMR protein\u2013proton side-chain assignments at 160 kHz and 1.2 GHz

saveframes.name: assembly_1
tags:
The HBV core protein assignments deposited here correspond to residues 1-149 
of the full length (183 residues) core protein. 
The core protein assembles into a Capsid with a icosahedral symmetry of T=4 
and consists of 240 copies Cp149 for a total size of 4.2 MDa.

data: 240 copies of Cp149 form the capsid
Cp149 capsid containing C48A C61A C107 mutations
Cp149 capsid containing C48A C61A C107 mutations in complex with HAP1
Cp149 capsid containing C48A C61A C107 mutations in complex with AT-130
